Name: White Coomb
Car_Park: Grey Mare's Tail car park (NT186144)
Reviews: I didn't reach the summit of the White Coomb because my shoes were wet and heavy. I've passed the waterfall and reached the lake at the top. The weather was so good, and it was not that difficult to climb. I also realized that waterproof shoes are very important. Before reaching the car park, I stopped at a small town, bought a cup of coffee and use their toilets cuz there's no toilets or visitor center near the White Coomb.
